summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Center and Account Details modules. All 20 features tested successfully. Backend APIs (20 tests) passed 100%. Frontend UI testing passed with one bug fixed (SelectItem empty value error in Audit Log filters). One backend bug fixed (KeyError in audit-logs endpoint).
passed_tests: 1. Admin Center page (/admin) loads with 4 tabs: Roles, Permissions, Users, Audit Log - PASS
2. Roles tab shows 4 default roles: Super Admin (max 3), Admin, Editor, Viewer with descriptions - PASS
3. Permissions tab shows permission matrix (features vs roles with R/W/D indicators) - PASS
4. Users tab shows user list with role badges and edit button - PASS
5. Audit Log tab shows action history with filters for action type and module - PASS
6. 'Assign Role' dialog allows selecting user by email and assigning a role - PASS
7. Account Details page (/account) loads with 3 tabs: Profile, Security, Billing - PASS
8. Profile tab shows user info with edit mode for name, phone, address, company, designation - PASS
9. Profile picture upload button works (camera icon on avatar) - PASS
10. Security tab shows Google OAuth status and disabled password change - PASS
11. Billing tab shows current plan with 'Upgrade Plan' and 'Cancel' buttons - PASS
12. Billing tab shows MOCKED notice about Razorpay placeholder - PASS
13. Upgrade dialog shows available plans (Starter, Professional, Enterprise) - PASS
14. Sidebar has 'Admin Center' nav item after Analytics - PASS
15. User dropdown menu has 'Account Details' and 'Admin Center' options - PASS
16. Backend API: GET /api/admin/roles returns 4 default roles - PASS
17. Backend API: GET /api/admin/features returns 8 platform features - PASS
18. Backend API: GET /api/admin/permission-matrix returns full matrix - PASS
19. Backend API: GET /api/account/profile returns user profile - PASS
20. Backend API: GET /api/account/subscription/plans returns 4 plans with Razorpay placeholders - PASS
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed KeyError in audit-logs endpoint when user_id is missing
/app/frontend/src/pages/AdminCenter.jsx - Fixed SelectItem empty value error in Audit Log filters
test_credentials: Session created via mongosh for test-admin-* (cleaned up after testing)
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing demo data and default roles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Center and Account Details modules are fully functional. Key test IDs: admin-center-page, assign-role-btn, account-details-page, user-menu-trigger, logout-btn, nav-admin. Billing is MOCKED with Razorpay placeholders (plan_PLACEHOLDER_STARTER, plan_PLACEHOLDER_PROFESSIONAL, plan_PLACEHOLDER_ENTERPRISE). Profile pictures stored in GridFS with max 5MB size. Default roles: super_admin (max 3), admin, editor, viewer. 8 platform features in permission matrix. Audit logs now handle missing user_id gracefully.

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Some audit log entries (like profile_view from matchmaker) don't have user_id field
bugs_fixed.fix: Added check for user_id existence before enriching logs with user names. Logs without user_id now show 'System' as user_name

bugs_fixed.issue: Uncaught runtime error: A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string
bugs_fixed.root_cause: SelectItem components in Audit Log filters had value='' which is not allowed in shadcn/ui Select
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed empty string values to 'all' and added transformation in onValueChange to convert 'all' back to empty string for filtering

roles_tab.description: Shows 4 default roles (Super Admin, Admin, Editor, Viewer) with descriptions, access levels, and permissions

permissions_tab.description: Shows permission matrix with 8 features vs 4 roles, R/W/D indicators

users_tab.description: Shows user list with role badges, search, and edit functionality

audit_log_tab.description: Shows action history with filters for action type and module

assign_role_dialog.description: Dialog for assigning roles to users by email

profile_tab.description: Shows user info with edit mode for name, phone, address, company, designation

profile_picture.description: Upload button with camera icon, stored in GridFS, max 5MB

security_tab.description: Shows Google OAuth status, disabled password change for OAuth users

billing_tab.description: Shows current plan, upgrade/cancel buttons, MOCKED Razorpay notice

upgrade_dialog.description: Shows 3 paid plans (Starter, Professional, Enterprise) with features

sidebar.description: Admin Center nav item in sidebar after Analytics

user_dropdown.description: Account Details and Admin Center options in user dropdown menu

mocked_apis.POST /api/account/subscription/upgrade: Returns MOCKED subscription_id and placeholder payment info
mocked_apis.POST /api/account/subscription/cancel: Marks subscription as cancelled without Razorpay API call

super_admin.permissions: Full access to all features including admin_center and user_management

editor.permissions: Read/write assessment and drhp_builder, read-only others

viewer.permissions: Read-only access to all features except admin_center and user_management
